item.text: I’ll inspect the email thread and the relevant customer/policy context through the email tools, then create the appropriate draft or workflow action with evidence IDs.

The thread is a refund request for a Pro plan purchase dated May 31, 2026, received July 15, 2026. I’m checking the customer/account record and refund policy before deciding whether this can be answered directly.

Maya is a standard-tier customer on Acme Health’s Pro plan. The refund policy allows full refunds within 30 days, and standard customers are not eligible after 30 days, so I’m drafting a reply that declines the refund with the concrete dates.

arguments.body:
Hi Maya,

Thanks for reaching out. I reviewed the request: the Pro plan was purchased on May 31, 2026, and your refund request came in on July 15, 2026.

Our policy allows full refunds within 30 days of purchase. Because this request is outside that 30-day window, and Acme Health is on a standard-tier account, we’re not able to process a refund back to the original card.

If any of the purchase or request details above look incorrect, please reply here and we can review them.

Best,
Support

Hi Maya,

Thanks for reaching out. I reviewed the request: the Pro plan was purchased on May 31, 2026, and your refund request came in on July 15, 2026.

If any of the purchase or request details above look incorrect, please reply here and we can review them.

Best,
Support

item.text: Created a draft reply for `support_001` declining the refund because the request is outside the 30-day refund window for a standard-tier customer.
